# ============================================================
# Dcode runtime + dev dependencies — pip-only fallback.
#
# Adds ruff / mypy / pytest / pytest-asyncio / httpx on top of
# requirements.txt. Primary path is `uv sync`.
#
# Install:
#   pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
#   pip install -e packages/shared -e apps/api -e apps/worker -e apps/agent -e apps/eval
#
# Regenerate: make requirements
# ============================================================
